title: Gopher
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:Gopher.jpg|thumb|250px|Launching from the ''[[Fogger]]'', a [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends]] piloted by Maarek Stele targets the ''Gopher''.]]

'''''Gopher''''' was a [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]] [[Container transport|Container Transport]] that hauled supplies for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].

During the battle to recapture [[Outpost D-34]] from the Rebels, [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] scanned the ''Gopher''{{'s}} cargo holds and discovered that it was carrying supplies looted from the station. Stele was congratulated by the Cloaked Figure, who then authorized the launch of [[Omega|stormtrooper transport ''Omega'']] to board and capture the ''Gopher''. Once seized, the vessel was taken into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], presumably to an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] impound yard.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
